channel.title: Gossip on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Gossip on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Bam-Bam Sally: De Saturday Market Tea, Who Getting Divorce in Providence, and Why Cousin Petal Banned from Dolly's Wedding
item.description:
Hello doux-doux darlings it’s your girl Bam-Bam Sally coming to you LIVE from the Bourda Market parking lot where I’ve been collecting information since 5:47 AM and let me tell you — it has been a SEASON already and the sun is not even fully up.

Grab a bake and saltfish. Sit down. Sally has THINGS.

1. DE PROVIDENCE DIVORCE

Okay okay okay. I cannot say names. I WILL NOT say names. But you know the couple in Providence with the house that has the three fountains in front? The one where the wife was always posting on Instagram with the captions about “my king”? The one where the husband drives the black Prado with the personalized plate?

item.title: The Rumour Mill — Sunday, April 12, 2026
item.description: De Rumour Mill is grinding this Easter Sunday — whispers about the Wales contract, the pilot rescue, a certain ministry, and who was seen where on the seawall with who.

item.title: Bam-Bam Sally — Sunday, April 12, 2026
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally is back from the seawall, full of cook-up and opinions, and she has PLENTY to say about the week's events, the national cleanup, and certain people who think she doesn't notice things.

item.title: Bam-Bam Sally and de Rumour Mill — April 8, 2026
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally with de Wednesday Rumour Mill — entirely fictional gossip about nobody in particular doing nothing specific somewhere unspecified. As always.

item.title: The Rumour Mill — April 8, 2026
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally's Wednesday Rumour Mill: what people are whispering about in Stabroek Market, at the seawall, and in the WhatsApp groups that nobody admits to being in.

item.title: Rumour Mill – Wednesday, April 1, 2026
item.description: Unverified, unconfirmed, and entirely too entertaining to ignore. The Rumour Mill grinds Wednesday.

item.title: Bam-Bam Sally's Saturday Special — Week of March 24, 2026
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally's longer lifestyle and gossip column. All fictional. All fabulous.

item.title: The Rumor Mill — March 24, 2026
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally with the week's whispers, rumours, and neighbourhood chatter. All fictional. All entertaining.

item.title: De Boys Seh — March 19, 2026
item.description: What de boys on the fictional corner saying this week. All names fictional. All scenarios fictional.

item.title: 🗣️ Bam-Bam Sally's Rumor Mill: Super Bowl Flag, Pump Station Drama, and Who Blacklisted Who
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally heard that somebody in the diaspora paid Bad Bunny to wave the Guyana flag, a certain pump station contractor is hiding from the Minister, and the blacklist is longer than 30 names.

item.title: 💅 Bam-Bam Sally's Rumor Mill — Saturday, February 7, 2026
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally back with de freshest fictional gossip! Carnival costumes, stadium VIP passes, mining camp drama, and who wedding get postpone AGAIN!

item.title: 📢 Bam-Bam Sally's Rumor Mill – Saturday, January 31, 2026
item.description: If yuh ain't hear it from me, it ain't worth hearing! Bam-Bam Sally got de HOT tea to close out January 2026!

item.title: 🔥 Bam-Bam Sally's Rumor Mill: January 24, 2026
item.description: De hottest fictional gossip from de streets! All names fake, all scenarios made up, all entertainment guaranteed!

item.title: Bam-Bam Sally's Rumor Mill: The Opposition Leader Tea Is SCALDING This Week
item.description: The completely fictional whispers making rounds in Georgetown this week. All names changed, all situations imagined, all entertainment guaranteed.

item.title: The Rumor Mill: What Georgetown Whispering This Week
item.description: The completely fictional whispers making rounds in Georgetown this week. All names changed, all situations imagined, all entertainment guaranteed.

item.title: 📢 Bam-Bam Sally's This Week in Rumors
item.description: If yuh ain't hear it from me, it ain't worth hearing! Bam-Bam Sally got de HOT tea dis week!

item.title: Bam-Bam Sally's This Week in Rumors
item.description: Eh-eh! Leh we see wha whispers floatin' 'round Guyana dis week. Now wid ratings so yuh know how serious de talk really is!
